sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, original_string String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World!'), (2, 'ClickHouse is great!');
UPDATE test_strings SET original_string = overlayUTF8(original_string, 'SQL', 7) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, overlayUTF8(original_string, 'Database', 1) AS modified_string FROM test_strings;
SELECT overlayUTF8('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.', 'red', 10, 5) AS new_string;
